text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ah, to think that I could feel such turbulence in
my heart...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It was just a way to kill time at first. But
then... I was so wrong...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Tragic fates, an inevitable clash between two
visions of justice... I was a fool to think it was only
for children. I must thank Biko for expanding my
world.
